# nomad_dynamic_host_volume (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "nomad_dynamic_host_volume" "example" {
  namespace = "prod"
  id        = "d688ff7a-d299-11ef-ae3c-6f2400953c18"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Volume ID

### Optional

- `namespace` (String) Volume namespace

### Read-Only

- `capability` (List of Object) Capability (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--capability))
- `capacity` (String) Provisioned capacity
- `capacity_bytes` (Number)
- `capacity_max` (String) Requested maximum capacity
- `capacity_max_bytes` (Number)
- `capacity_min` (String) Requested minimum capacity
- `capacity_min_bytes` (Number)
- `constraint` (List of Object) Constraints (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--constraint))
- `host_path` (String) Host path
- `name` (String) Volume name
- `node_id` (String) Node ID
- `node_pool` (String) Node pool
- `parameters` (Map of String) Parameters
- `plugin_id` (String) Plugin ID
- `state` (String) State

<a id="nestedatt--capability"></a>
### Nested Schema for `capability`

Read-Only:

- `access_mode` (String)
- `attachment_mode` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--constraint"></a>
### Nested Schema for `constraint`

Read-Only:

- `attribute` (String)
- `operator` (String)
- `value` (String)
